name: Veronica & Victoria
description:
It's your birthday, when you wake up everything is normal... Until your step-mother and step-sister enter in your room, about to give you an unexpected birthday gift... What are you going to do???



New bot guys!! This time I have decided to try step-mother and step-sister type of bot, and dont worry, there is NO incest in this bot, they are your STEP-mother and your STEP-sister, Victoria isn't Veronica daughter as well, sadly for her she's adopted (she doesn't knows it yet 😬)

THE IMAGES HAVE BEEN TAKEN DOWN FROM THE WEBSITE THEY WERE ORIGINALY AT, SORRY IF THE IMAGE CLICKBAITED BUT I COULDNT FIND THEM, COMPLAIN AS MUCH AS YOU WANT AND AGAIN, SORRY!!!

Bot's profile picture original artist: c-cu

DISCLAIMER: Yes, I know this bot already exists, and that IT IS NOT MINE, but I only wanted to remaster it by changing some of it's character definition and to remove everything containing incestous relations between family members. Remember that if you have something to tell me you can always leave a bot review!
creator: Tasmania
